name.zh: 一年级：观察与基础科学

question.zh: 关于“生物与非生物”，哪项陈述最符合科学证据？
question.en: Which statement about Living and nonliving things best matches scientific evidence?

options.zh: 只有会移动的物体才是生物
options.en: Only objects that move are living

options.zh: 生物需要能量并会对环境变化作出反应
options.en: Living things need energy and respond to environmental change

options.zh: 现象只由随机巧合造成，不能提出任何可检验解释
options.en: The observation is only coincidence and permits no testable explanation

options.zh: 这说明所有环境和样本都会得到完全相同结果
options.en: This proves every environment and sample must give exactly the same result

question.zh: 观察到：向日葵幼苗连续几天朝窗户方向弯曲。最合理的解释是什么？
question.en: Observation: A sunflower seedling bends toward a window over several days. What is the best explanation?

options.zh: 只有会移动的物体才是生物
options.en: Only objects that move are living

options.zh: 无需比较条件，因为任何解释都同样正确
options.en: No comparison is needed because every explanation is equally correct

options.zh: 幼苗正在对光作出反应
options.en: The seedling is responding to light

options.zh: 该现象足以证明一个与观察无关的普遍结论
options.en: The observation proves an unrelated universal conclusion

question.zh: 哪项证据最直接支持这一结论：生物需要能量并会对环境变化作出反应？
question.en: Which evidence most directly supports this conclusion: Living things need energy and respond to environmental change?

options.zh: 只记录研究者原先的猜测，不进行观察
options.en: Record only the original guess without observation

options.zh: 改变多个条件且不保留对照组
options.en: Change many conditions without a control group

options.zh: 引用一个与该结论无关的现象
options.en: Cite an observation unrelated to the conclusion

options.zh: 向日葵幼苗连续几天朝窗户方向弯曲
options.en: A sunflower seedling bends toward a window over several days

question.zh: 要检验“生物与非生物”相关规律，哪种方案最可靠？
question.en: Which design most reliably tests the principle of Living and nonliving things?

options.zh: 设置实验组和对照组，只改变目标条件，重复测量并比较结果
options.en: Use experimental and control groups, change only the target condition, repeat measurements, and compare results

options.zh: 同时改变所有条件，只测量一次
options.en: Change all conditions at once and measure only once

options.zh: 只选择符合预期的数据，舍弃其余结果
options.en: Keep only expected data and discard the rest

options.zh: 实验组和对照组使用不同测量方法
options.en: Use different measurement methods for experimental and control groups

question.zh: 若把花盆每天转半圈，根据已有规律最合理的预测是？
question.en: If we Rotate the flowerpot half a turn each day, what is the most reasonable prediction?

options.zh: 所有变量都必然保持不变
options.en: Every variable must remain unchanged

options.zh: 幼苗会逐渐重新朝向窗户
options.en: The seedling will gradually bend toward the window again

options.zh: 结果必然完全反向且与条件无关
options.en: The result must reverse completely regardless of conditions

options.zh: 一次结果即可证明预测在所有情况下永远成立
options.en: One result would prove the prediction forever in every situation

question.zh: 学习“生物与非生物”时，哪项观察最有用？
question.en: When learning about Living and nonliving things, which observation is most useful?

options.zh: 只保留符合原先猜想的数据
options.en: Keep only the data that agree with the original guess

options.zh: 只做一次测量并把结果当作永远正确
options.en: Make one measurement and treat it as universally true

options.zh: 向日葵幼苗连续几天朝窗户方向弯曲
options.en: A sunflower seedling bends toward a window over several days

options.zh: 用一个无关故事替代测量证据
options.en: Replace measured evidence with an unrelated story

question.zh: 要公平比较“生物与非生物”，应该怎么做？
question.en: How can a comparison about Living and nonliving things be made fair?

options.zh: 同时改变多个因素，之后只测量一次
options.en: Change several factors at once and then measure only once

options.zh: 只保留符合原先猜想的数据
options.en: Keep only the data that agree with the original guess

options.zh: 实验组和对照组使用不同的测量方法
options.en: Use different measurement methods for the test and comparison groups

options.zh: 只改变要研究的因素，其他条件保持相同
options.en: Change only the factor being tested and keep other conditions the same

question.zh: 怎样让“生物与非生物”的测量结果更可靠？
question.en: How can measurements about Living and nonliving things be made more reliable?

options.zh: 重复测量并比较各次结果
options.en: Repeat the measurements and compare the results

options.zh: 只做一次测量并把结果当作永远正确
options.en: Make one measurement and treat it as universally true

options.zh: 只保留符合原先猜想的数据
options.en: Keep only the data that agree with the original guess

options.zh: 实验组和对照组使用不同的测量方法
options.en: Use different measurement methods for the test and comparison groups

question.zh: 如果“生物与非生物”的结果和猜想不同，下一步应该做什么？
question.en: If a result about Living and nonliving things differs from the prediction, what should be done next?

options.zh: 用一个无关故事替代测量证据
options.en: Replace measured evidence with an unrelated story

options.zh: 检查过程、重复试验，并根据全部证据修改解释
options.en: Check the procedure, repeat the test, and revise the explanation using all evidence

options.zh: 删除不符合预测的数据
options.en: Delete data that do not match the prediction

options.zh: 忽略结果并继续坚持原来的说法
options.en: Ignore the result and keep the original claim unchanged

question.zh: 关于“生物与非生物”，哪项是可以用观察检验的预测？
question.en: Which prediction about Living and nonliving things can be checked by observation?

options.zh: 用一个无关故事替代测量证据
options.en: Replace measured evidence with an unrelated story

options.zh: 忽略结果并继续坚持原来的说法
options.en: Ignore the result and keep the original claim unchanged

options.zh: 幼苗会逐渐重新朝向窗户
options.en: The seedling will gradually bend toward the window again

options.zh: 只做一次测量并把结果当作永远正确
options.en: Make one measurement and treat it as universally true

options.zh: 只做一次测量并把结果当作永远正确
options.en: Make one measurement and treat it as universally true

options.zh: 伤口附近细胞分裂频率暂时升高
options.en: Cell division temporarily increases near a wound

options.zh: 用一个无关故事替代测量证据
options.en: Replace measured evidence with an unrelated story

options.zh: 只保留符合原先猜想的数据
options.en: Keep only the data that agree with the original guess

question.zh: 设计“细胞分裂”实验时，怎样控制变量最合理？
question.en: What is the best way to control variables in an investigation of Cell division?

options.zh: 只保留符合原先猜想的数据
options.en: Keep only the data that agree with the original guess

options.zh: 实验组和对照组使用不同的测量方法
options.en: Use different measurement methods for the test and comparison groups

options.zh: 只改变要研究的因素，其他条件保持相同
options.en: Change only the factor being tested and keep other conditions the same

options.zh: 同时改变多个因素，之后只测量一次
options.en: Change several factors at once and then measure only once

question.en: Which practice most improves the reliability of measurements about Cell division?

options.zh: 只做一次测量并把结果当作永远正确
options.en: Make one measurement and treat it as universally true

options.zh: 只保留符合原先猜想的数据
options.en: Keep only the data that agree with the original guess

options.zh: 实验组和对照组使用不同的测量方法
options.en: Use different measurement methods for the test and comparison groups

options.zh: 重复测量并比较各次结果
options.en: Repeat the measurements and compare the results

question.zh: 若“细胞分裂”数据与预测不符，研究者应如何处理？
question.en: How should researchers respond when data about Cell division conflict with a prediction?

options.zh: 检查过程、重复试验，并根据全部证据修改解释
options.en: Check the procedure, repeat the test, and revise the explanation using all evidence

options.zh: 删除不符合预测的数据
options.en: Delete data that do not match the prediction

options.zh: 忽略结果并继续坚持原来的说法
options.en: Ignore the result and keep the original claim unchanged

options.zh: 用一个无关故事替代测量证据
options.en: Replace measured evidence with an unrelated story

options.zh: 现象只由随机巧合造成，不能提出任何可检验解释

options.en: A population can grow exponentially forever in a finite environment

options.en: Record only the original guess without observation

options.zh: 改变多个条件且不保留对照组
options.en: Change many conditions without a control group

options.zh: 观察研究发现运动与健康相关，但运动者饮食也更健康
options.en: An observational study links exercise to health, but exercisers also eat better

options.zh: 引用一个与该结论无关的现象
options.en: Cite an observation unrelated to the conclusion

question.zh: 要检验“因果推断”相关规律，哪种方案最可靠？
question.en: Which design most reliably tests the principle of Causal inference?

options.zh: 同时改变所有条件，只测量一次
options.en: Change all conditions at once and measure only once

options.zh: 只选择符合预期的数据，舍弃其余结果
options.en: Keep only expected data and discard the rest

options.zh: 实验组和对照组使用不同测量方法
options.en: Use different measurement methods for experimental and control groups

options.zh: 设置实验组和对照组，只改变目标条件，重复测量并比较结果
options.en: Use experimental and control groups, change only the target condition, repeat measurements, and compare results

question.en: If we Randomly assign eligible participants to exercise plans and blind outcome assessment, what is the most reasonable prediction?

options.zh: 组间混杂平均减少，因果证据增强
options.en: Average confounding between groups decreases and causal evidence strengthens

options.zh: 所有变量都必然保持不变
options.en: Every variable must remain unchanged

options.zh: 结果必然完全反向且与条件无关
options.en: The result must reverse completely regardless of conditions

options.zh: 一次结果即可证明预测在所有情况下永远成立
options.en: One result would prove the prediction forever in every situation

question.zh: 检验“因果推断”机制性解释时，哪项证据与因果主张最直接相关？

options.en: An observational study links exercise to health, but exercisers also eat better

options.zh: 用一个无关故事替代测量证据

options.en: Keep only the data that agree with the original guess

options.zh: 只保留符合原先猜想的数据

question.zh: “因果推断”数据违背模型预测时，哪种处理最符合证伪原则？
question.en: When data about Causal inference violate a model prediction, which response best follows falsification principles?

options.zh: 检查过程、重复试验，并根据全部证据修改解释
options.en: Check the procedure, repeat the test, and revise the explanation using all evidence

options.zh: 删除不符合预测的数据
options.en: Delete data that do not match the prediction

options.zh: 忽略结果并继续坚持原来的说法
options.en: Ignore the result and keep the original claim unchanged

options.zh: 用一个无关故事替代测量证据
options.en: Replace measured evidence with an unrelated story

options.zh: 这说明所有环境和样本都会得到完全相同结果
options.en: This proves every environment and sample must give exactly the same result

options.zh: 为了得到显著结果可在看完数据后不披露地反复更换假设
